Based information provided SEEMO, Valdec received several threats during 2006, they became more serious December 2006 when received numerous death threats telephone email.
television show "Istraga", which been broadcast since September 2005, weekly criminal investigation programme.
programme shows compilation dozens crime stories involving organized crime, violence against children women, drug dealers, crimes, corruption, among others.

SEEMO also supports HND's assertion that those with legitimate complaints against media have range different mechanisms pursue these complaints.
Death threats represent serious attempt pressure media they should condemned whenever wherever they occur.
SEEMO also been informed that police have started investigation.
With this mind, call Your Excellencies everything your power protect Valdec's life those family members, take necessary steps against person persons responsible these threats.
would also like remind that, numerous occasions 2006, SEEMO been informed threats made other investigative journalists Croatia.

Being diagnosed with cancer nightmarish.
something anyone ever wants encounter.
here's thing regardless your age, gender race, cancer does discriminate.
Instead sulking getting depressed allowing cancer drain life you, stand fight today.
cancer take away everything love, including life once enjoyed.
Read: Ways Cancer Diagnosis Define You.
face life's obstacles defines
Hearing words have cancer frightening before know your mind starts race countless therapies, treatments, doctor's visits uncertainties.
stop there minute.
Here where realise, like every obstacle, cancer different must define you.
overcoming cancer, realise importance keeping positive mind focus better, heal look towards healthier future.
Doctor's appointments cancer treatments toll you.
important seek emotional support from family friends.
Taking time spend with your loved ones bring encouragement help take your mind from constant worry about doctor's appointments treatment follow-ups.
Cancer week vulnerable state.
Therefore, important seek help advice from family, friends cancer support groups.
need know that there people willing help important afraid help.
hold your struggle.
Learn them talking family friends writing them down.
Sometimes journaling your pain hurt bring more ease than know
Besides, sharing your struggle writing them down, might become inspiration someone, someday.
Whatever cancer stop from living your dreams.
there goal dream have achieve, make happen now.
Whether start business, college degree travel country have been before, cancer steal your dreams.
Relive these dreams again.
cancer consume life you.
Deciding your fear cancer first step ever make living passionate joyful life deserve.
your worries best survive cancer simply live!
Cancer physically emotionally painful journey that ever wants encounter face their lifetime.
Still, that does mean should control you.
Instead worrying, walk, live enjoy your life moment time.
